ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "mobility" REAL /* Mobility rate of the city */,
  "urban" INTEGER /* Urbanization rate of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Average elevation of the city in meters */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the city */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the city was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "black" REAL /* Percentage of black population */,
  "seg_racial" REAL /* Racial segregation index */,
  "seg_income" REAL /* Income segregation index */,
  "seg_poverty" REAL /* Poverty segregation index */,
  "seg_affluence" REAL /* Affluence segregation index */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON string representing age distribution (e.g., {'0-14': 20, '15-64': 60, '65+': 20}) */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of males to females */,
  "ethnic_diversity_index" REAL /* Index measuring ethnic diversity */,
  "immigrant_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is immigrants */,
  "native_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is native */,
  "language_diversity" TEXT /* JSON string representing language diversity (e.g., {'English': 80, 'Spanish': 15, 'Other': 5}) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "school_spending" REAL /* School spending per student */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Student-teacher ratio */,
  "test_scores" REAL /* Average test scores */,
  "hs_dropout" REAL /* High school dropout rate */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate of the city */,
  "higher_education_institutions" INTEGER /* Number of higher education institutions */,
  "enrollment_rate" REAL /* Enrollment rate in primary and secondary education */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate from high school */,
  "education_spending_per_capita" REAL /* Education spending per capita */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economy" (
  "economy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Median household income */,
  "gini" REAL /* Gini coefficient */,
  "share01" REAL /* Share of income for the top 1% */,
  "gini_99" REAL /* Gini coefficient for the top 99% */,
  "middle_class" REAL /* Middle class share of the population */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the city */,
  "job_growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of job growth */,
  "median_rent" REAL /* Median rent for housing */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the city */,
  "employment_sectors" TEXT /* JSON string representing employment sectors (e.g., {'Manufacturing': 20, 'Services': 60, 'Agriculture': 10, 'Other': 10}) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economy_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "violent_crime" REAL /* Violent crime rate */,
  "single_mothers" REAL /* Percentage of single mothers */,
  "divorced" REAL /* Percentage of divorced population */,
  "married" REAL /* Percentage of married population */,
  "property_crime_rate" REAL /* Property crime rate */,
  "crime_trends" TEXT /* JSON string representing crime trends over the past few years (e.g., {'2018': 0.002, '2019': 0.0015, '2020': 0.001}) */,
  "police_force_size" INTEGER /* Number of police officers */,
  "police_budget" REAL /* Police budget */,
  "civic_engagement" REAL /* Percentage of the population involved in civic activities */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
